title: Edit Distance
hints: Consider how the optimal cost for prefixes relates to the cost of transforming shorter prefixes. What happens if the current characters match versus when they differ?
This problem exhibits optimal substructure and overlapping subproblems, suggesting dynamic programming. Build a table where each cell represents the edit distance for specific prefix lengths.
For each pair of prefixes, the minimum operations depend on three possibilities: matching characters (no cost), inserting, deleting, or substituting. The answer lies in the bottom-right cell.
